---
title: Tutorial template
description: A learning-oriented layout for narrative, hands-on docs that give readers an immediate win.
---

Use this layout when you want to guide someone through a first success and help them start building a mental model of your product.

## The goal

Provide a narrative, hands-on experience that gives the reader an immediate win and helps them begin building a mental model of the system.

## The tone

Encouraging, authoritative, and instructional. Do not offer choices or deep explanations here — just tell them what to do next.

## Recommended layout

### Introduction

A brief statement of exactly what the user will build by the end of this page.

### Prerequisites

Any tools, API keys, or setups they absolutely need before they start.

### Step-by-step instructions

Chronological, foolproof steps leading to a successful execution.

### Next steps

Where to go next once they have achieved their first success.
